THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALLE, ANNA $3,404.32 PRINCIPAL, $249.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,653.32, DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS OF $139.30 DUE ON THE 10TH DAY OF EACH MONTH. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS
